creator: trashcan@ellael.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #10)

Here is another example:

[stable-default] Fetching dovecot-pigeonhole-0.5.21_2.pkg: .......... done
[00:02:59] Package fetch: Using cached copy of dovecot-pigeonhole-0.5.21_2
[00:03:02] Deleting dovecot-pigeonhole-0.5.21_2.pkg: missing dependency: dovecot-2.3.21_6
[00:03:03] Error: /usr/local/share/poudriere/bulk.sh:download_from_repo_post_delete:20:download_from_repo_post_delete: We lost fetched unversioned dovecot-pigeonhole-0.5.21_2.pkg
